name: Athenaeum
description: Enterprise learning catalog across five software-development verticals. Each course is original synthetic content grounded on the public Microsoft certification skills outlines (no proprietary or copied Microsoft text).

verticals.title: Cloud & Backend Development
verticals.summary: Build, secure, and integrate production cloud applications on Azure — compute, storage, identity, and service integration.

courses.title: Azure Compute & Serverless Foundations
courses.summary: Design and operate the compute layer of a cloud application using App Service, Azure Functions, and containers.
courses.grounded_on: AZ-204 skills outline (2026-01-14), paraphrased — original synthetic content

modules.title: Hosting web APIs with Azure App Service
modules.summary: Create, configure, and deploy web apps on App Service with slots and TLS.
objectives: Create and configure an App Service web app for a backend API
Use deployment slots for zero-downtime releases and slot swaps
Configure TLS, app settings, and service connections securely
grounded_skills: Create an Azure App Service Web App
Configure deployment slots
Deploy code and containerized solutions
Configure settings including TLS, API settings, and service connections
Implement autoscaling

modules.title: Event-driven code with Azure Functions
modules.summary: Build serverless functions with triggers and input/output bindings.
objectives: Create and configure an Azure Functions app
Implement triggers using timers, webhooks, and data operations
Wire input and output bindings to reduce boilerplate
grounded_skills: Create and configure an Azure Functions app
Implement input and output bindings
Implement function triggers by using data operations, timers, and webhooks

modules.title: Containerized solutions: ACR, ACI, and Container Apps
modules.summary: Package and run containers across Azure's container services.
objectives: Build and publish container images to Azure Container Registry
Run isolated workloads on Azure Container Instances
Design microservice solutions on Azure Container Apps
grounded_skills: Create and manage container images for solutions
Publish an image to Azure Container Registry
Run containers by using Azure Container Instances
Create solutions by using Azure Container Apps

modules.title: Scaling, configuration, and diagnostics
modules.summary: Make compute resilient with autoscaling, configuration, and logging.
objectives: Implement autoscaling rules for variable load
Configure diagnostics and logging for running services
Choose the right compute service for a workload
grounded_skills: Implement autoscaling
Configure and implement diagnostics and logging
Create solutions by using Azure Container Apps

courses.title: Cloud Data & Storage for Developers
courses.summary: Persist and serve application data with Azure Cosmos DB and Blob Storage using the SDKs correctly.
courses.grounded_on: AZ-204 skills outline (2026-01-14), paraphrased — original synthetic content

modules.title: Working with Azure Cosmos DB
modules.summary: Perform container and item operations with the SDK and pick consistency levels.
objectives: Perform CRUD operations on containers and items via the SDK
Select an appropriate consistency level for a workload
Reason about request units and partitioning
grounded_skills: Perform operations on containers and items by using the SDK
Set the appropriate consistency level for operations

modules.title: Reacting to data with the change feed
modules.summary: Build event-driven flows from the Cosmos DB change feed.
objectives: Implement change feed notifications
Design idempotent change-feed consumers
Compare change feed with polling
grounded_skills: Implement change feed notifications
Perform operations on containers and items by using the SDK

modules.title: Azure Blob Storage with the SDK
modules.summary: Store and manage unstructured data, properties, and metadata.
objectives: Perform blob operations using the appropriate SDK
Set and retrieve properties and metadata
Choose access tiers for cost and performance
grounded_skills: Perform operations on data by using the appropriate SDK
Set and retrieve properties and metadata

modules.title: Data lifecycle and storage policies
modules.summary: Automate retention and tiering with lifecycle management.
objectives: Implement storage lifecycle management policies
Automate tiering and expiry of data
Apply data protection options to blobs
grounded_skills: Implement storage policies and data lifecycle management
Set and retrieve properties and metadata

courses.title: Securing & Integrating Cloud Applications
courses.summary: Authenticate users, protect secrets, and integrate services with API Management and messaging.
courses.grounded_on: AZ-204 skills outline (2026-01-14), paraphrased — original synthetic content

modules.title: Authentication with the Microsoft identity platform
modules.summary: Authenticate and authorize users and apps with Microsoft Entra ID.
objectives: Authenticate users with the Microsoft identity platform
Authorize apps using Microsoft Entra ID
Call Microsoft Graph on behalf of a user
grounded_skills: Authenticate and authorize users by using the Microsoft Identity platform
Authenticate and authorize users and apps by using Microsoft Entra ID
Implement solutions that interact with Microsoft Graph

modules.title: Secrets, keys, and managed identities
modules.summary: Protect configuration and credentials with Key Vault and managed identities.
objectives: Store and retrieve secrets, keys, and certificates from Key Vault
Use managed identities to avoid credentials in code
Secure app configuration data
grounded_skills: Secure app configuration data by using Azure App Configuration or Azure Key Vault
Develop code that uses keys, secrets, and certificates stored in Azure Key Vault
Implement Managed Identities for Azure resources
Create and implement shared access signatures

modules.title: Publishing APIs with Azure API Management
modules.summary: Front, document, secure, and govern APIs with APIM.
objectives: Create an API Management instance and import APIs
Configure access and subscription keys
Apply policies for transformation, caching, and rate limiting
grounded_skills: Create an Azure API Management instance
Create and document APIs
Configure access to APIs
Implement policies for APIs

modules.title: Event- and message-based integration
modules.summary: Decouple services with Event Grid, Event Hubs, Service Bus, and queues.
objectives: Implement event-based solutions with Event Grid and Event Hubs
Implement message-based solutions with Service Bus and Queue Storage
Choose between events and messages for a scenario
grounded_skills: Implement solutions that use Azure Event Grid
Implement solutions that use Azure Event Hubs
Implement solutions that use Azure Service Bus
Implement solutions that use Azure Queue Storage

verticals.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
verticals.summary: Deliver software continuously and safely: source control strategy, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and secure operations.

courses.title: Source Control & Collaboration Strategy
courses.summary: Design branching, pull-request, and traceability practices for healthy team delivery.
courses.grounded_on: AZ-400 skills outline (2026-04-24), paraphrased — original synthetic content

modules.title: Choosing a branching strategy
modules.summary: Compare trunk-based, feature, and release branching for a team's context.
objectives: Compare trunk-based, feature-branch, and release-branch strategies
Select a branching model for a given team and release cadence
Map a branching model to environments
grounded_skills: Design a branch strategy, including trunk-based, feature branch, and release branch

modules.title: Pull requests, policies, and protection
modules.summary: Enforce quality with branch policies and protection rules.
objectives: Design a pull-request workflow with required reviews
Apply branch policies and protection rules
Implement merge restrictions that match risk
grounded_skills: Design and implement a pull request workflow by using branch policies and branch protection rules
Implement branch merging restrictions by using branch policies and branch protection rules

modules.title: Managing and scaling repositories
modules.summary: Handle large files, permissions, and repository scale.
objectives: Manage large files with Git LFS
Configure repository permissions and tags
Apply a strategy for scaling a large Git repository
grounded_skills: Design and implement a strategy for managing large files, including Git LFS
Configure permissions in the source control repository
Design a strategy for scaling and optimizing a Git repository
Configure tags to organize the source control repository

modules.title: Traceability and flow of work
modules.summary: Connect work items, commits, and dashboards across GitHub and Azure Boards.
objectives: Design traceability from work item to deployment
Integrate Azure Boards with GitHub repositories
Build flow metrics like cycle time and lead time
grounded_skills: Design and implement a structure for the flow of work, including GitHub Flow
Design and implement integration for tracking work, including GitHub projects, Azure Boards, and repositories
Design and implement a dashboard, including flow of work, such as cycle times, time to recovery, and lead time

courses.title: CI/CD Pipelines & Release Engineering
courses.summary: Build robust YAML pipelines with package management, testing gates, and safe deployment strategies.
courses.grounded_on: AZ-400 skills outline (2026-04-24), paraphrased — original synthetic content

modules.title: Building pipelines with YAML

objectives: Develop multi-stage pipelines in YAML
Create reusable templates, variables, and variable groups
Implement trigger rules and job execution order
grounded_skills: Develop pipelines by using YAML
Create reusable pipeline elements, including YAML templates, task groups, variables, and variable groups
Develop and implement pipeline trigger rules
Design and implement a strategy for job execution order, including parallelism and multi-stage pipelines

modules.title: Package management and artifact versioning
modules.summary: Manage dependencies and artifacts with feeds and versioning.
objectives: Design package feeds with GitHub Packages or Azure Artifacts
Apply a dependency versioning strategy (SemVer/CalVer)

grounded_skills: Recommend package management tools including GitHub Packages and Azure Artifacts

modules.title: Testing strategy and quality gates
modules.summary: Embed tests, coverage, and gates into the pipeline.
objectives: Design a layered testing strategy in pipelines
Implement quality and release gates
Integrate code coverage analysis
grounded_skills: Design a comprehensive testing strategy, including local tests, unit tests, integration tests, and load tests
Design and implement quality and release gates, including security and governance
Implement code coverage analysis

modules.title: Progressive deployment strategies
modules.summary: Ship safely with blue-green, canary, rings, and feature flags.
objectives: Design blue-green, canary, and ring deployments
Minimize downtime with slots and rolling deployments
Implement feature flags with App Configuration
grounded_skills: Design a deployment strategy, including blue-green, canary, ring, progressive exposure, feature flags, and A/B testing
Plan for minimizing downtime during deployments by using load balancing, rolling deployments, and deployment slot usage and swap
Implement feature flags by using Azure App Configuration Feature Manager

courses.title: Secure DevOps & Observability
courses.summary: Codify infrastructure, manage secrets without leaks, scan for vulnerabilities, and instrument the platform.
courses.grounded_on: AZ-400 skills outline (2026-04-24), paraphrased — original synthetic content

modules.title: Infrastructure as code with Bicep
modules.summary: Define and deploy environments as code with desired-state configuration.
objectives: Define an IaC strategy with source control and automated testing

grounded_skills: Define an IaC strategy, including source control and automation of testing and deployment

modules.title: Secrets and secretless authentication

objectives: Manage secrets, keys, and certificates with Key Vault
Implement secretless auth with OIDC/workload identity federation

grounded_skills: Implement and manage secrets, keys, and certificates by using Azure Key Vault

modules.title: Security and compliance scanning
modules.summary: Automate dependency, code, secret, and container scanning.
objectives: Design a security scanning strategy across the SDLC

grounded_skills: Design a strategy for security and compliance scanning, including dependency, code, secret, and licensing scanning

modules.title: Instrumentation and monitoring
modules.summary: Make the platform observable with App Insights and KQL.
objectives: Configure telemetry collection with Application Insights

grounded_skills: Configure collection of telemetry by using Application Insights, VM Insights, Container Insights

verticals.title: Data Engineering & Analytics
verticals.summary: Design storage, build batch and streaming data pipelines, and operate analytics platforms on Azure.

modules.title: Partition strategies for analytical data
